```{r}
#| include: false
# Resolve the project root — works for top-level and nested .qmd pages.
.project_root <- Sys.getenv("QUARTO_PROJECT_DIR", unset = NA)
if (is.na(.project_root) || .project_root == "") {
  # Fallback: walk up from the qmd's directory looking for _quarto.yml.
  .here <- normalizePath(getwd(), mustWork = FALSE)
  while (.here != "/" && !file.exists(file.path(.here, "_quarto.yml"))) {
    .here <- dirname(.here)
  }
  .project_root <- .here
}

# Point reticulate at the project venv. The rieszboost venv currently holds
# rieszreg + rieszboost + krrr (editable installs).
if (Sys.getenv("RETICULATE_PYTHON") == "") {
  for (cand in c(file.path(.project_root, "../.venv"),
                 file.path(.project_root, "../rieszboost/.venv"))) {
    if (dir.exists(cand)) {
      reticulate::use_virtualenv(normalizePath(cand, mustWork = FALSE), required = TRUE)
      break
    }
  }
}

# Dev-load rieszreg first (rieszboost and krrr import from it), then
# rieszboost. krrr's R wrapper is loaded on demand by pages that use it.
suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(
  file.path(.project_root, "../rieszreg/r/rieszreg"),
  quiet = TRUE
))
suppressMessages(pkgload::load_all(
  file.path(.project_root, "../rieszboost/r/rieszboost"),
  quiet = TRUE
))
```
